creator: freebsd@toyingwithfate.com
text:
Created attachment 179736
patch to install new version 0.2.2

Version 0.2.2 of dnscrypt-wrapper was released, so I've created a patch to upgrade the port accordingly. Please note that I've removed two files that are no longer necessary, using the following commands:

svnlite rm files/patch-Makefile
svnlite rm files/patch-argparse_Makefile
